scope.rationale: PyTorch Dataset + DataLoader + transforms (DiffusionDet 동치: short 800-1333 + flip 0.5). Hydra configs/data/{coco,voc}.yaml — batch_size 등 재현성 자료.

steps.name: transforms-common
steps.success_metric: test -f datasets/transforms.py && python3 -c 'from datasets.transforms import build_transforms; print(build_transforms.__name__)'
steps.summary: datasets/transforms.py — build_transforms(short_sides, max_size, flip_prob, mean, std, is_train) + Compose/RandomResize/RandomHorizontalFlip/ToTensor/Normalize + collate_fn (32-multiple zero-padding). torchvision.transforms.functional 사용, detectron2 의존성 0. AC PASS (640x480 PIL → tensor [3,800,1067], boxes shape [1,4]).

steps.name: hydra-configs
steps.success_metric: test -f configs/data/coco.yaml && test -f configs/data/voc.yaml && python3 -c 'from omegaconf import OmegaConf; OmegaConf.load("configs/data/coco.yaml")'
